Defines unit test versioning for Bluetooth persistent storage in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a preprocessor directive for a version identifier, `UNITTEST_BT_PERSISTENT_STORAGE_VERSION`, which is set to 2. It includes the header file `bluetooth_persistent_storage_v2_impl.h` from the specified path, which suggests that this file is part of a Bluetooth-related service implementation. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The file is likely used in the context of unit testing for Bluetooth persistent storage functionality, as indicated by the naming convention of the version macro.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `services/normal/bluetooth/bluetooth_persistent_storage_v2_impl.h`
